info.name: Gym CRM REST API
info.description: Collection runner checks for Gym CRM REST endpoints. Run from top to bottom against a running stack. The collection creates test trainee/trainer profiles, logs in, stores Bearer JWT tokens, verifies positive and negative security scenarios, and checks that trainer workload summary is updated asynchronously through the outbox and ActiveMQ.

exec: pm.test('Training types list is returned', function () {
pm.test('Trainee profile belongs to created trainee', function () {
pm.test('Trainer profile belongs to created trainer', function () {
pm.test('Unassigned trainers response is an array', function () {

item.name: Wait For Workload Message Delivery
item.description: Workload updates are asynchronous: training creation stores an outbox event and the scheduled dispatcher publishes it to ActiveMQ. This request waits before checking the workload summary.

exec: pm.test('Training types endpoint is available after wait', function () {
pm.test('Trainer workload summary contains the ActiveMQ-delivered training', function () {
pm.test('Trainee trainings list contains added training', function () {
pm.test('Trainer trainings list contains added training', function () {
pm.test('Updated trainee profile is returned', function () {
pm.test('Updated trainer profile is returned', function () {
pm.test('New trainee token is returned', function () {
